title: No dependency manifest (requirements.txt / pyproject.toml)
evidence: server.py:8 imports pandas and mcp.server.fastmcp; data_loader.py:5 imports pandas; no requirements.txt or pyproject.toml present in run_dir
suggestion: Add a requirements.txt pinning pandas and mcp so the server is reproducibly installable

title: Lint/quality score below clean (code_quality=0.667)
evidence: scores.json code_quality=0.6666666666666666 (ruff-based quality scorer); .ruff_cache present in run_dir
suggestion: Run ruff and address remaining style/quality warnings

title: Head-to-head is folded into search_matches rather than a dedicated tool
evidence: server.py:122 search_matches appends a head-to-head summary only when both team and opponent are passed (via _h2h_summary at server.py:36); there is no standalone get_head_to_head tool
suggestion: Requirement R11 is satisfied, but a dedicated h2h tool would be more discoverable to MCP clients

title: Team filtering uses substring match on normalized names, risking over-matching
evidence: data_loader.py:218 find_team_matches uses str.contains(normalize_team(team)); e.g. 'sport' matches any team containing that substring
suggestion: Consider exact/word-boundary matching for team filters to avoid false positives in stats and head-to-head
